title: Bouncer Golems
description: Need more style in your world? Turn your Golems in to suited up security machines. To protect you and your stuff in style.
body: # Bouncer Golems ## Need more style in your world? Turn your Golems into suited up security machines to protect you, your world and your property in style. ![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6e4d7abf008b8248689828994dd3a020249a739.png) ### What's in the resource pack? * Iron Golem Re-skin * Snow Golem Re-skin * Copper Golem Re-Skin * Custom spawn egg textures # Damage States ![damage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6e4d7abf008b8248689828994dd3a020249a739.png) ## Keep in Touch Have ideas or suggestions? Want to know what's in the works? Follow us: | Instagram |X (Twitter) | | --------- |----------- | | | |
